description: On-device ranker upgrade (ONNX WASM/WebGPU), anti-engagement-trap with screen time alerts, and 'Why am I seeing this?' feed explainer. Complete the microfeatures for user agency and transparency.
steps: Enhance packages/recommendations/src/on-device-ranker.ts: add model size validation (reject models > 5MB). Add performance budget enforcement (reject if inference > 50ms on benchmark). Add WebGPU/WASM runtime detection: prefer WebGPU if available, fallback to WASM. Add getModelSizeBytes() method. Add benchmarkInference(samples) method that returns p95 latency.

Create packages/recommendations/src/on-device-ranker-model.ts: OnDeviceModelExporter class. Defines the architecture of the small ranker model (input: 16-dim feature vector, hidden: 32 neurons, output: 1 score). Provides exportToOnnx() method stub that describes model structure. Documents the model contract: input shape [N, 16], output shape [N, 1], model size target < 5MB.

Enhance packages/ranking/src/anti-rage-integration.ts: add screen-time tracking. Add ScreenTimeMonitor class: tracks cumulative session time, fires 'time_alert' event at 30min (configurable), user can opt-out. Add engagement-trap detection: if content causes rapid re-engagement (< 3s between items) for > 10 consecutive items, flag as engagement-trap and diversify feed.

Create packages/ranking/src/feed-explainer.ts: FeedExplainer class. For each ranked feed item, produces 'Why am I seeing this?' explanation. Top-3 signals from: 'Posted by someone you follow', 'Similar to content you engaged with', 'Trending in your community', 'Boosted by anti-rage quality signal', 'New from a topic you like', 'Promoted content'. Methods: explain(rankedItem, userProfile) -> ExplanationResult with top 3 signals.

Create packages/ranking/src/__tests__/feed-explainer.test.ts: test explanation generation for different ranking signal combinations, test that exactly 3 signals are returned, test signal ordering by contribution.
Create packages/ranking/src/__tests__/screen-time-monitor.test.ts: test time tracking, alert firing at threshold, opt-out behavior, engagement-trap detection.
Update packages/ranking/src/index.ts barrel to export FeedExplainer and ScreenTimeMonitor.
Update packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/on-device-ranker.test.ts: add tests for model size validation, performance budget check, runtime detection.
Ensure all existing tests pass. Run full monorepo typecheck and test.
acceptance_criteria: On-device ranker benchmarkInference returns p95 latency (tested)
ScreenTimeMonitor fires alert at 30min and respects opt-out (tested)
Engagement-trap detection flags rapid-fire consumption patterns (tested)
FeedExplainer returns top-3 ranking signals for any feed item (tested)
findings: Model size estimation: actual math is 16*32+32+32*1+1=577 params (not 545 as described in spec). All tests pass. Pre-commit hooks ran prettier formatting successfully.
